title: Multiple Workers
excerpt: description: Miniflare allows you to run multiple workers in the same instance. All Workers can be defined at the same level, using the workers option. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Miniflare allows you to run multiple workers in the same instance. All Workers can be defined at the same level, using the `workers` option.
